items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
🆕SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Series Small Shoulder Bag❤
Crafted from white calfskin leather, interpreting timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde design.
The piece features a practical leather shoulder strap, adorned with a classic snake-head magnetic clasp. Its enchanting scales and design draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, suitable for daily wear. It includes a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an interior quilted pocket, three card slots, a customizable vanity mirror, and a BULGARI metal logo on the back.
Size: 22 X 15 X 4.5 cm
Model: 292104

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Goyard (Goyard) has undergone multiple research and improvements, constantly upgrading the fabric and leather. Exclusive customization TM️ is only to constantly meet customers' high-quality requirements 🔝🔝
The base fabric uses high-quality custom rain-dyed hemp consistent with ZP 〽️, coated with glossy shellac [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is [Top-grain South African crushed leather] 👛🤘 Flexible and not prickly 💪 Replaced with matching pure steel hardware 🤓 Matching symmetrical patterns, pure colors with no color difference 😘 Check details in the pictures [Bow] [Bow]
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 19*Base Width 10cm
🔎020181

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ❤️ Woven Small Square Bag
Most existing styles are a bit trendy
and a bit hard to style
So I picked this one!
This small square bag is similar to the Cloud Bag in small size
But! It is lighter than the Cloud Bag and has much more capacity
This is a little cutie that crosses all age groups
I like it, Mom likes it, and even Grandma will like it!
And the large woven pattern won't look old-fashioned~
As someone who is half a fashionista, I think
this is a very excellent small bag!
Specially bought a ZP to develop
Model 3001S Size 22*15*8cm
